title: gates run state
description: Schema for .gates/runs/<run_id>.yaml — the persisted state of a skill machine execution.

sub_run_id.description: When this state delegated to a sub-skill, the run_id of the sub-run.

parent_run_id.description: When this run is a sub-run created by a delegate_to state, points at the run_id of the parent run.

parent_state.description: When this run is a sub-run, the name of the state in the parent run that created this sub-run.

parent_skill_id.description: When this run is a sub-run, the skill_id of the parent run. Used to tell the agent which skill to invoke to resume the parent.
